  • Exports
Source   Edit  

Research Effects

Tech level effects on game systems per economy.md:4.0

Tech effects:

  • WEP: +10% AS/DS per level (combat)
  • EL: +5% GCO per level (economy)
  • CST: +1 squadron limit per level (fleet capacity)
  • ELI: Detection bonus (scouts, raiders)
  • TER: Terraforming speed and cost
  • SLD: Planetary shields
  • CIC: Counter-intelligence
Economic Level Effects (economy.md:4.2)Weapons Tech Effects (economy.md:4.6)Construction Tech Effects (economy.md:4.5)Electronic Intelligence Effects (economy.md:4.8)Terraforming Effects (economy.md:4.7)Cloaking Effects (economy.md:4.9)Planetary Shields Effects (economy.md:4.10)Counter-Intelligence Effects (economy.md:4.11)Fighter Doctrine Effects (economy.md:4.12)Carrier Operations Effects (economy.md:4.13)

Imports

../../common/types/tech

proc applyDefenseBonus(baseDS: int; wepLevel: int): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Apply WEP bonus to Defense Strength Note: WEP affects both AS and DS Source   Edit

    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if colony can be terraformed with current TER level Must have TER level equal to target class Source   Edit

proc getCloakingDetectionDifficulty(clkLevel: int): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}

Get detection difficulty for cloaked ships Higher CLK = harder to detect

NOTE: Full cloaking system implemented in intelligence/detection.nim Formula: d20 + ELI_total vs (10 + CLK_level)

Source   Edit

    forbids: [].}

Get construction speed bonus Higher CST = faster ship/building construction

Get GCO bonus from Economic Level Per economy.md:4.2: +5% per level, max 50% Source   Edit

NOTE: Full ELI detection system implemented in intelligence/detection.nim This function returns basic level for simple calculations

Source   Edit   
proc getTerraformingBaseCost(currentClass: int): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}

Get base PP cost for terraforming to next class Per economy.md Section 4.7 and config/tech.toml

Costs by target class: Extreme (1) -> Desolate (2): 60 PP Desolate (2) -> Hostile (3): 180 PP Hostile (3) -> Harsh (4): 500 PP Harsh (4) -> Benign (5): 1000 PP Benign (5) -> Lush (6): 1500 PP Lush (6) -> Eden (7): 2000 PP

Source   Edit   
proc getTerraformingSpeed(terLevel: int): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get turns required for terraforming Higher TER = faster terraforming Per spec: 10 - TER_level turns (minimum 1) Source   Edit   
proc getWeaponsBonus(wepLevel: int): float {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get AS/DS bonus from Weapons tech Per economy.md:4.6: +10% per level Source   Edit
